description_long: This is a pair of classic, full-rim sunglasses with a bold, rectangular frame and slightly curved temples. The frame is thick and solid, giving the glasses a sturdy and fashionable appearance suitable for urban environments. The lenses are dark-tinted, providing strong sun protection and a sleek, modern look. The temples are straight with a gentle downward curve at the ends, designed to fit comfortably over the ears. There are no visible embellishments or patterns on the frame or temples, emphasizing a minimalist and timeless style. The bridge is a standard, integrated type, smoothly connecting the two lenses without any visible nose pads.
description: A pair of classic, full-rim rectangular sunglasses with dark lenses and thick, minimalist frames.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular frame, dark lenses, and the integrated bridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, thick temple and the gentle curve at the end.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the curvature of the temples and the overall width of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and the consistent thickness of the frame.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with thick, solid construction and gently curved temples. The design is minimalist with no visible embellishments or patterns.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark, opaque tint with uniform coloration and no visible gradient or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: Standard integrated bridge, smoothly connecting the lenses without separate nose pads or distinctive shaping.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, thick, and unadorned, with a gentle downward curve at the ends and no visible patterns or engravings.
